title: Ontario Vehicle Registration (Permit and Licence Plate)
description: Apply to the Ontario Ministry of Transportation (MTO), through a ServiceOntario Driver and Vehicle Licence Issuing Office, either to register a private vehicle for the first time and attach new number plates, or to apply for a replacement of a lost, stolen, or damaged vehicle permit, validation sticker, or number plates — both transactions use the same Application for Vehicle Registration form (SR-LV-006E). This is Ontario's Vehicle Registration/Tag/Title-family counterpart to the already-published nz/nzta/vehicle-licence-renewal and nl/rdw/vehicle-ownership-transfer: Canada (all provinces, not only Ontario) had a Drivers Licence Renewal schema (ca/on/mto/drivers-licence-renewal) but no Vehicle Registration/Tag/Title schema at all before this one. Models an ordinary individual registering an eligible passenger-class vehicle (passenger, motorcycle, moped, off-road vehicle, trailer, or motorized snow vehicle) or requesting a replacement document/plate, including the registrant/address/vehicle-identification fields, the vehicle-status declaration, the replacement-specific fields, and the compulsory automobile insurance certification. It does not model: commercial, bus, farm, dealer/manufacturer, or other business-fleet vehicle classes and their associated declarations (Section 5's CVOR/farm-truck/school-bus/historic-vehicle/low-speed-vehicle declarations); an ownership transfer between two individuals (a distinct 'Transfer' transaction type on the same form's office-use section, with no dedicated buyer/seller fields on the applicant-facing pages — a separate future schema); a gross-weight/seating-capacity change (Section 6); or the routine, non-eventful annual licence-plate renewal already reachable through ServiceOntario's own online/automatic renewal service (a separate, still-uncaptured live wizard — see the ca/on/mto/vehicle-permit-renewal discovery candidate). It does not submit the application; the live ServiceOntario service and the applicant's local Issuing Office are always authoritative — see VERIFICATION.md.

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored directly from the current SR-LV-006E (edition 2023/04) 'Application for Vehicle Registration' PDF, downloaded without any bot-block from forms.mgcs.gov.on.ca (the Ontario government's own Central Forms Repository). This is a genuine fillable AcroForm (XFA) PDF with 128 real, named form-field widgets across 4 pages — richer sourcing than a static/flattened form, each field's own alternativeText/tooltip transcribed verbatim into this schema's sourceRef values. Page 4 ('Office Use Only') is staff-completed, not applicant-facing, and was used only as corroborating context (its 'Transaction Type' checklist confirms 'Original Registration' and 'Replacement' as the two transaction types this schema models). The live ServiceOntario/MTO transactional counter process itself is only reachable in person at an Issuing Office; no public online field-by-field walkthrough exists for this specific form. Status remains draft, not verified.

fields.name: transactionType
fields.label: Transaction type
fields.description: new_registration = registering a vehicle for the first time and/or attaching new number plates (Sections 1-3, 7, 8); replacement = applying for a replacement vehicle permit, validation sticker, or number plates (Section 4, plus 7, 8). Both are transaction types the source form's own office-use 'Transaction Type' checklist ('Original Registration' / 'Replacement') distinguishes.
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, page 4, Section B 'Transaction Type' — 'Original Registration ... Replacement'

fields.name: registrantIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Registrant Identification Number (Driver's Licence Number)
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Registrant Identification Number (Driver's Licence Number). New Plate Registrants only.'

fields.name: registrantSex
fields.label: Sex
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Sex'

fields.name: registrantDateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Date of Birth (yyyy/mm/dd)'

fields.name: registrantName
fields.label: Last Name, First Name and Middle Initial or Company Name
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Last Name, First Name and Middle Initial or Company Name'

fields.name: isNewRegistrantOrAddressChanged
fields.label: Are you a new registrant, or has your address changed?
fields.description: Gates whether the physical-address fields below must be completed.
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Complete address section only if new registrant or address changed.'

fields.label: Street Number and Name, P.O. Box Number, R.R. Number or Lot, Concession and Township
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Street Number and Name, P.O. Box Number, R.R. Number or Lot, Concession and Township'

fields.label: Apartment Number
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Apartment Number'

fields.name: physicalAddressCity
fields.label: City, Town or Village
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'City, Town or Village'

fields.name: physicalAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Postal Code
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Postal Code. Enter Postal Code in format: letter, digit, letter, digit, letter, digit.'

fields.name: mailingAddressDifferentFromPhysical
fields.label: Is the mailing address different from the physical address?
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Mailing Address (Complete below only if mailing address is different from above)'

fields.name: mailingAddressStreet
fields.label: Mailing Address — Street Number and Name or Lot, Concession and Township
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Mailing Address. Street Number and Name or Lot, Concession and Township.'

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Mailing Address — City, Town or Village
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Mailing Address. City, Town or Village.'

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Mailing Address — Postal Code
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Mailing Address. Postal Code.'

fields.name: vehicleToBeRegisteredToTwoIndividuals
fields.label: Vehicle to be registered to 2 individuals
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 1 — 'Check below if. Vehicle to be registered to 2 individuals.'

fields.name: existingPlateNumberToBeAttached
fields.label: Plate number to be attached
fields.description: For a new registration: an existing plate number to be attached to this vehicle, if new number plates are not required. For a replacement: the plate number of the vehicle the lost/stolen/damaged permit, sticker, or plates belong to (Section 4's own 'Complete if applicable ... Plate Number').
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 2 — 'Enter plate number to be attached'; Section 4 — 'Complete if applicable: Plate Number'

fields.name: newNumberPlatesRequired
fields.label: Are new number plates required?
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 2 — 'Are new number plates required? Yes / No'

fields.name: vehicleClass
fields.label: Vehicle Class
fields.description: Restricted to the individual/private vehicle classes this schema models. Commercial and Bus, also offered on the source form, are out of scope (business-fleet use).
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 2 — 'Vehicle Class - Check one. Passenger / Motorcycle / Moped / Off-Road / Trailer / Motorized Snow / Commercial / Bus'

fields.name: odometerKm
fields.label: Odometer (km)
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 2 — 'Odometer (km)'

fields.name: returningPlatesForCreditOrCancellationNumber
fields.label: Plate number being returned for credit or cancellation
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 2 — 'If returning plates for credit or cancellation, enter plate number'

fields.name: vehicleStatus
fields.label: Is this vehicle to be registered?
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 3 — 'Vehicle Status. Is this vehicle to be registered? Fit / Unfit / Temporary / Other'

fields.name: vehicleStatusOtherDescription
fields.label: Other vehicle status (describe)
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 3 — 'Is this vehicle to be registered? ... Other'

fields.name: replacementItem
fields.label: Item being replaced
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 4 — 'I hereby make application for replacement of: Vehicle Permit / Validation Sticker / Number Plates'

fields.name: reasonForReplacement
fields.label: Reason for Replacement
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 4 — 'Reason for Replacement'

fields.name: replacementValidationNumber
fields.label: Validation Number
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 4 — 'Complete if applicable: Plate Number / Validation Number / Vehicle Identification Number'

fields.name: vehicleIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Vehicle Identification Number
fields.description: Used both to identify the vehicle on a replacement application (Section 4, 'Complete if applicable') and to identify the insured vehicle on the compulsory insurance certificate (Section 7).
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 4 — 'Vehicle Identification Number'; Section 7 — 'I hereby certify that the motor vehicle bearing Vehicle Identification Number (Serial Number) is insured...'

fields.name: insuranceCompanyName
fields.label: Name of Insurance Company
fields.description: Compulsory automobile insurance, per the Compulsory Automobile Insurance Act.
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 7 — 'Certificate of Insurance (The Compulsory Automobile Insurance Act) ... Name of Insurance Company'

fields.name: insurancePolicyNumber
fields.label: Policy Number
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 7 — 'Policy Number'

fields.name: applicantPrintedName
fields.label: Name (Please Print)
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 8 — 'Name (Please Print)'

fields.name: informationTrueDeclaration
fields.label: Declaration: the information in this application is true
fields.description: Under provincial legislation, the penalty for making a false statement may include a fine and/or imprisonment and/or a driver's licence suspension.
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 8 — 'I hereby certify the information in this application is true ... Authorized Signature ... the penalty for making a false statement may include a fine and/or imprisonment and/or a driver's licence suspension.'

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: Date
fields.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, Section 8 — 'Date (yyyy/mm/dd)'

documents.label: Personal identification (or third-party/dealer-agent authorization)
documents.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, page 4, Section D 'Identification Viewed' — 'Personal ID / Third Party / DAL'

documents.label: Source document proving the vehicle's origin (New Vehicle Information Statement/dealer certificate, or the vehicle portion of an existing Ontario, out-of-province, or out-of-country permit)
documents.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, page 4, Section E 'Identify Source Document' — 'N.V.I.S. or Dealer Certificate / Permit-Vehicle Portion / Permit-Out of Province / Permit-Out of Country'

documents.label: Registration/validation/administration fee payment
documents.sourceRef: SR-LV-006E, page 4, Section H 'Processing Information' — 'Validation ($) / Admin./Reg. ($) / HST ($) / RST ($)'. Amount not encoded as a fixed field value: MTO computes the validation fee, administration fee, and applicable HST/RST from the vehicle class, weight, and transaction type, none of which the applicant enters directly as a dollar amount.
